title: McRacing resource pack
description: official resource pack of the MCRacing IBR team, this pack modifies BoatHud and Racings scoreboard to mcdonalds theme and a few small UI changes as well
body:
MCRacing IBR Team Resource Pack – McDonald's Theme Edition

This is the official resource pack for the MCRacing IBR (Ice Boat Racing) team. Designed to bring some fun and flair to your races, this pack applies a McDonald's-themed makeover to key racing UI elements.

Features:
- Custom BoatHud visuals with McDonald's-style UI elements
- Themed Racing Scoreboard, featuring IBR team branding and colors
- Minor UI tweaks to enhance clarity and match the overall aesthetic

Compatibility:

Designed for Ice Boat Racing events and compatible with:
- BoatHud
- Racing Scoreboard

Installation:

Make sure you have BoatHud and Racing Scoreboard installed.
Add this resource pack to your Minecraft client like any other pack.
Move it to the top of your pack list for full visual effect.
